headline: Alena Brenner Appointed Builders FirstSource Chief Legal Officer
summary: IRVING, Texas, April 20, 2026--Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) ("Builders FirstSource" or the "Company") today announced the appointment of Alena Brenner as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary, reporting to CEO Peter Jackson. Ms. Brenner will lead all legal, risk management, government affairs, compliance, corporate social responsibility, and insurance functions for the Company. She will also serve as the primary legal advisor to the Builders FirstSource
